summary: Comprehensive end-to-end regression test for Agent Anatomy app (Iteration 12) after major content overhaul. 51+ documents across 16 categories verified. Backend: 29/32 tests passed (3 minor naming discrepancy failures - expected names vs actual names). Frontend: All major features working correctly.

minor.issue: Category 'Limitations' expected but actual is 'Limitations & Constraints' - naming mismatch in test, not a bug
Document 'The Agent Loop' expected but actual is 'The Agent Loop: Perceive, Think, Act' - naming mismatch in test
Document 'Cost Optimization' expected but actual is 'Cost Optimization for AI Agents' - naming mismatch in test

issues: React hydration warnings about span elements in table rows - cosmetic console warnings, does not affect functionality

success_rate.backend: 91% (29/32 tests passed - 3 naming mismatches in test assertions, not actual bugs)

test_credentials: No credentials needed - public access with hardcoded admin (admin@emergent.sh)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing 58 documents
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is stable. 58 documents, 65 categories (16 public top-level). All major features verified: Home page with 16 category cards, sidebar navigation, document viewer with markdown/mermaid/tables, search (35 results for 'agent loop'), AI chatbot working (Claude Sonnet), bookmarks, tools page, settings with user management, analytics dashboard with metrics, trash with restore, theme toggle (dark/light).

home_page.details: 16 category cards displayed, 'Agent Anatomy' branding, tag filtering available, Tools & Resources NOT appearing as category

sidebar_navigation.details: Categories expand/collapse, documents clickable, active doc highlighted, search works

document_viewer.details: Markdown renders (headings, tables, code, lists), Mermaid diagrams render as SVGs, TOC on right side, breadcrumb, action buttons (bookmark, PDF export, edit, delete)

search.details: Inline search in sidebar works, found 35 results for 'agent loop', clicking result navigates to document

bookmarks.details: Can bookmark document, appears in /bookmarks page, can remove

tools_page.details: /tools loads with Add Resource button, empty state shown

settings_page.details: /settings loads with user management, shows 4 team members with role dropdowns

trash_page.details: /trash loads, shows deleted items with restore/delete buttons

analytics_page.details: /analytics loads with 58 docs, 155 views, 17 searches, 16 AI chats metrics, popular docs chart, search queries, recent activity

theme_toggle.details: Toggle between dark and light mode works

ai_chatbot.details: FAB opens chat panel, sends messages, AI responds via Claude Sonnet

backend_crud.details: All document/category/tool CRUD operations working, soft-delete moves to trash

internal_categories_hidden.details: Test Cases category marked as internal:true, not shown in public views

mocked_apis.authentication: MOCKED - hardcoded admin user (admin@emergent.sh), no real login flow
